import{useEffect,useRef}from'react';import*as THREE from'three';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function HeroThreeScene(){const mountRef=useRef(null);useEffect(()=>{const mount=mountRef.current;if(!mount)return;const W=mount.clientWidth;const H=mount.clientHeight;const scene=new THREE.Scene();const camera=new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(60,W/H,0.1,100);camera.position.set(0,0,8);const renderer=new THREE.WebGLRenderer({alpha:true,antialias:true});renderer.setSize(W,H);renderer.setPixelRatio(Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio,2));renderer.setClearColor(0x000000,0);mount.appendChild(renderer.domElement);// Ambient light
scene.add(new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff,0.3));const redLight=new THREE.PointLight(0xe50914,3,20);redLight.position.set(-5,3,5);scene.add(redLight);const blueLight=new THREE.PointLight(0x4466ff,2,20);blueLight.position.set(5,-3,5);scene.add(blueLight);const objects=[];// Create torus rings (film reel aesthetic)
for(let i=0;i<3;i++){const geo=new THREE.TorusGeometry(1.5+i*0.6,0.04,8,64);const mat=new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({color:i===0?0xe50914:i===1?0x4466ff:0xffffff,emissive:i===0?0x660000:i===1?0x002244:0x111111,metalness:0.8,roughness:0.2,transparent:true,opacity:0.7});const torus=new THREE.Mesh(geo,mat);torus.rotation.x=Math.PI/4+i*0.3;torus.rotation.y=i*0.5;scene.add(torus);objects.push({mesh:torus,speed:0.003+i*0.002,axis:i%2===0?'x':'y'});}// Central glowing sphere
const sphereGeo=new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.5,32,32);const sphereMat=new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({color:0xe50914,emissive:0xe50914,emissiveIntensity:0.8,metalness:1,roughness:0,transparent:true,opacity:0.9});const sphere=new THREE.Mesh(sphereGeo,sphereMat);scene.add(sphere);// Floating cubes
for(let i=0;i<15;i++){const size=0.05+Math.random()*0.15;const geo=new THREE.BoxGeometry(size,size,size);const mat=new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({color:Math.random()>0.5?0xe50914:0x4466ff,emissive:Math.random()>0.5?0x440000:0x001133,metalness:0.9,roughness:0.1,transparent:true,opacity:0.6});const cube=new THREE.Mesh(geo,mat);cube.position.set((Math.random()-0.5)*12,(Math.random()-0.5)*8,(Math.random()-0.5)*4);cube.userData={vx:(Math.random()-0.5)*0.005,vy:(Math.random()-0.5)*0.005,rx:Math.random()*0.02,ry:Math.random()*0.02};scene.add(cube);objects.push({mesh:cube,isCube:true});}// Particle trail
const trailGeo=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const count=500;const pos=new Float32Array(count*3);for(let i=0;i<count;i++){pos[i*3]=(Math.random()-0.5)*20;pos[i*3+1]=(Math.random()-0.5)*12;pos[i*3+2]=(Math.random()-0.5)*8-2;}trailGeo.setAttribute('position',new THREE.BufferAttribute(pos,3));const trailMat=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:0.03,color:0xe50914,transparent:true,opacity:0.4});const trail=new THREE.Points(trailGeo,trailMat);scene.add(trail);// Mouse interaction
const mouse={x:0,y:0};const handleMouse=e=>{mouse.x=e.clientX/window.innerWidth*2-1;mouse.y=-(e.clientY/window.innerHeight)*2+1;};window.addEventListener('mousemove',handleMouse);let t=0;let animId;const animate=()=>{animId=requestAnimationFrame(animate);t+=0.01;// Rotate rings
objects.forEach(obj=>{if(!obj.isCube){obj.mesh.rotation.x+=obj.speed*0.8;obj.mesh.rotation.y+=obj.speed;}else{obj.mesh.position.x+=obj.mesh.userData.vx;obj.mesh.position.y+=obj.mesh.userData.vy;obj.mesh.rotation.x+=obj.mesh.userData.rx;obj.mesh.rotation.y+=obj.mesh.userData.ry;if(Math.abs(obj.mesh.position.x)>7)obj.mesh.userData.vx*=-1;if(Math.abs(obj.mesh.position.y)>5)obj.mesh.userData.vy*=-1;}});// Pulse sphere
const scale=1+Math.sin(t*2)*0.15;sphere.scale.set(scale,scale,scale);sphereMat.emissiveIntensity=0.5+Math.sin(t*3)*0.3;// Mouse parallax
camera.position.x+=(mouse.x*0.5-camera.position.x)*0.05;camera.position.y+=(mouse.y*0.3-camera.position.y)*0.05;camera.lookAt(0,0,0);// Animate lights
redLight.position.x=Math.sin(t*0.5)*5;blueLight.position.x=-Math.sin(t*0.5)*5;// Scroll trail
const p=trailGeo.attributes.position.array;for(let i=0;i<count;i++){p[i*3+2]+=0.01;if(p[i*3+2]>5)p[i*3+2]=-8;}trailGeo.attributes.position.needsUpdate=true;renderer.render(scene,camera);};animate();const handleResize=()=>{if(!mount)return;camera.aspect=mount.clientWidth/mount.clientHeight;camera.updateProjectionMatrix();renderer.setSize(mount.clientWidth,mount.clientHeight);};window.addEventListener('resize',handleResize);return()=>{cancelAnimationFrame(animId);window.removeEventListener('mousemove',handleMouse);window.removeEventListener('resize',handleResize);renderer.dispose();if(mount.contains(renderer.domElement))mount.removeChild(renderer.domElement);};},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{ref:mountRef,style:{width:'100%',height:'100%'}});}
